examples.title: Merkle Tree Construction
examples.description: This pseudocode demonstrates the construction of a Merkle tree.
examples.code:
FUNCTION constructMerkleTree(data)
 blocks = divideDataIntoBlocks(data)
 FOR EACH block IN blocks
 hash = calculateHash(block)
 CREATE NODE node WITH hash
 ADD node TO merkleTree
 END FOR
 WHILE merkleTree HAS MORE THAN ONE NODE
 PAIR NODES AND CALCULATE HASH
 CREATE NEW NODE WITH HASH
 ADD NEW NODE TO merkleTree
 END WHILE
 RETURN merkleTree
END FUNCTION
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the construction of a Merkle tree by dividing the data into blocks, calculating the hash of each block, and pairing the nodes to calculate the hash of each pair.

examples.title: Merkle Tree Construction in Python
examples.description: This Python code demonstrates the construction of a Merkle tree.
examples.explanation: This Python code demonstrates the construction of a Merkle tree by dividing the data into blocks, calculating the hash of each block using SHA-256, and pairing the nodes to calculate the hash of each pair.
